test_matrix.name: Audio-only and Video-only (Prerecorded)
test_matrix.rationale: Audio-only content must provide a text transcript as the sole means of access for deaf and hard-of-hearing users

test_matrix.name: Captions (Prerecorded)
test_matrix.rationale: Captions for prerecorded video are the primary way deaf users access spoken content. Accuracy, synchronization, and speaker identification all require manual review

test_matrix.name: Captions (Live)
test_matrix.rationale: Live captions are essential for real-time access to live audio content such as webinars, lectures, and broadcasts

test_matrix.name: Non-text Content
test_matrix.rationale: Non-text content such as audio-only files must have text alternatives so hearing-impaired users can access the information

test_matrix.name: Audio Description or Media Alternative (Prerecorded)
test_matrix.rationale: Audio descriptions or full media alternatives ensure users who cannot hear the audio track can still access all information

test_matrix.name: Audio Control
test_matrix.rationale: Audio control ensures users are not overwhelmed by auto-playing audio they cannot easily mute
